# Nightjar

> Nightjar is a formal verification tool for AI-generated Python code. It runs a 5-stage pipeline — preflight, dependencies, schema validation, property-based testing, and formal proof via Dafny/CrossHair — to mathematically prove code satisfies specifications.

## Documentation
- [Getting Started](https://nightjarcode.dev/docs/quickstart): Install and run your first verification
- [Spec Format](https://nightjarcode.dev/docs/card-format): How to write .card.md specification files
- [Pipeline Stages](https://nightjarcode.dev/docs/pipeline): What each stage does
- [Bug Reports](https://nightjarcode.dev/bugs/): 48 confirmed bugs found across 20 codebases
- [Package Scans](https://nightjarcode.dev/scan/): Security scan results

## Comparisons
- [Nightjar vs CrossHair](https://nightjarcode.dev/compare/nightjar-vs-crosshair)
- [Nightjar vs Semgrep](https://nightjarcode.dev/compare/nightjar-vs-semgrep)
- [Nightjar vs Bandit](https://nightjarcode.dev/compare/nightjar-vs-bandit)

## Install
pip install nightjarzzz

## Key Facts
- Found 48 confirmed bugs across 20 popular Python packages
- 5-stage cheapest-first pipeline: preflight → deps → schema → PBT → formal proof
- CEGIS retry loop repairs failing code using counterexamples
- AGPL-3.0 open source, commercial licenses available
- Works without Dafny (falls back to CrossHair + Hypothesis)
